description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named conda_build that runs on push to tags v* and branch master, and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have concurrent builds with cancel-in-progress set to true. It should set up an environment with various Conda and Python settings. The workflow consists of two jobs: test with Conda libsecp256k1 on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.12, which checks style and typing, runs tests and benchmarks; and build Linux wheels, which depends on the test job, builds sdist and wheel, and tests the wheel in a clean environment.
